rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a detailed and thorough critique, suggesting specific revisions that improve clarity and address issues in the original text, indicating a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identified several areas of uncertainty but did not consistently mark confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope, addressing all requested dimensions without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; potential issues in the original text were flagged appropriately.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons, falling short of full traceability.
